§6Hydrogen Peroxide§f

§aVersatile corrosive liquid — essential for ore crystallization, bedrock cleaning, and advanced chemistry!§f

§bHydrogen Peroxide§f (H2O2) is a corrosive liquid heavily used in crystallization of ores, cleaning bedrock ore, and as a precursor for §bSulfuric Acid§f, §bSchrabidium Trisulfide§f, and §bOsmiridic Solution§f.

§6Production§f (Chemical Plant, 2.5s, 100HE/t):
§b• §e1,000mB§f Water → §e1,000mB§f Hydrogen Peroxide

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• Ore Acidizer§f: process sand → fiberglass, desh blend → desh, cinnabar → mercury, coal → graphite, rotten flesh → leather, many more
§b• Chemical Plant§f: Sulfuric Acid, Yellowcake, Schrabidium Trisulfide, Osmiridic Solution, Tantalium Polycrystal
§b• Industrial Mixer§f: Sulfuric Acid
§b• Soldering Station§f: Capacitor Board (peroxide + lead wire + PCB)
§b• Custom crafting§f: Caustic Barbed Wire, Jar of Corrosive Fumes, Crystallizer Upgrade, Rigged Star Blaster Energy Cell
§b• Rocketry§f: Thermobaric rocket pods (610mm, 227mm)

§eTip§f: Hydrogen Peroxide is one of the most versatile liquids in the mod. Set up continuous production early — you will need vast quantities!
